item.title: Container Recovery by Pepe's Towing
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a container recovery with careful coordination and professional towing procedures.

media:content.media:title: Container Recovery by Pepe's Towing
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a container recovery with careful coordination and professional towing procedures.

item.title: Container Recovery With Pepe's Towing
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a challenging container recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety

media:content.media:title: Container Recovery With Pepe's Towing
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a challenging container recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety

item.title: 70,000-Lb Battery Trailer Recovery
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a heavy-duty trailer recovery involving a 70,000-lb battery load, using professional equipment and careful coordination.

media:content.media:title: 70,000-Lb Battery Trailer Recovery
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a heavy-duty trailer recovery involving a 70,000-lb battery load, using professional equipment and careful coordination.

item.title: Prevost Bus Recovery at Chevron
item.description: Alexander Hernandez used Big Flipper to recover a stuck Prevost bus and clear blocked lanes in about 15 minutes.

media:content.media:title: Prevost Bus Recovery at Chevron
media:content.media:description: Alexander Hernandez used Big Flipper to recover a stuck Prevost bus and clear blocked lanes in about 15 minutes.

item.title: A Challenging Semi Recovery Operation
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a demanding semi recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety.

media:content.media:title: A Challenging Semi Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a demanding semi recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety.

item.title: 18,000lb Alternator Recovery on the Freeway
item.description: Pepe's Towing responds to recover an 18,000lb alternator that fell from a trailer on the freeway, using careful coordination and safe towing procedures.

media:content.media:title: 18,000lb Alternator Recovery on the Freeway
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing responds to recover an 18,000lb alternator that fell from a trailer on the freeway, using careful coordination and safe towing procedures.

item.title: Overloaded Trailer Recovery in Action
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles an overloaded trailer recovery with careful teamwork, equipment use, and roadside safety.

media:content.media:title: Overloaded Trailer Recovery in Action
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles an overloaded trailer recovery with careful teamwork, equipment use, and roadside safety.
